/* ============================================================================
   Willverse Wiki — site design system ("the illuminated ledger")
   Pushed as MediaWiki:Common.css by setup_wiki_pages.py / push_taxonomy.py.
   Identity: deep navy + aged gold on warm parchment; serif prose, sans data
   cards. All component markup (infobox/navbox/banners) is class-based HTML
   emitted by templates — every visual decision lives here.
   ========================================================================== */

:root {
    --wv-navy: #1c2942;
    --wv-navy-2: #22304f;
    --wv-gold: #c9a227;
    --wv-gold-bright: #f0c96a;
    --wv-paper: #fdfcf7;
    --wv-paper-2: #f5f2e9;
    --wv-ink: #26282b;
    --wv-line: #e2ddd0;
    --wv-line-strong: #b9b3a4;
    --wv-serif: "Palatino Linotype", "Book Antiqua", Palatino, "URW Palladio L",
                Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
    --wv-sans: "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
}

/* ---- page canvas ------------------------------------------------------- */
body { background: #e8e6dd; }
#content {
    background: var(--wv-paper);
    border: 1px solid var(--wv-line-strong);
    border-right: none;
}

/* ---- typography: serif prose, ledger headings -------------------------- */
#content .mw-parser-output {
    font-family: var(--wv-serif);
    font-size: 15.5px;
    line-height: 1.68;
    color: var(--wv-ink);
}
#firstHeading {
    font-family: var(--wv-serif);
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--wv-navy);
    box-shadow: 0 3px 0 -1px var(--wv-gold);   /* navy rule + thin gold echo */
    padding-bottom: 0.15em;
}
.mw-parser-output h2 {
    font-family: var(--wv-serif);
    font-variant: small-caps;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    color: var(--wv-navy);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--wv-line-strong);
}
.mw-parser-output h3 { font-family: var(--wv-serif); color: var(--wv-navy-2); }
.mw-parser-output a:hover { text-decoration-color: var(--wv-gold); }

/* ---- table of contents -------------------------------------------------- */
.toc, .mw-parser-output .toc {
    background: var(--wv-paper-2);
    border: 1px solid var(--wv-line);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--wv-gold);
    font-family: var(--wv-sans);
    font-size: 87%;
    padding: 8px 14px;
}
.toc .toctitle h2 { border: none; font-variant: normal; }

/* ---- ordinary tables softened ------------------------------------------ */
.mw-parser-output table.wikitable { background: #fff; border-color: var(--wv-line); font-family: var(--wv-sans); font-size: 90%; }
.mw-parser-output table.wikitable > * > tr > th { background: var(--wv-paper-2); border-color: var(--wv-line); }
.mw-parser-output table.wikitable > * > tr > td { border-color: var(--wv-line); }

/* ---- category bar ------------------------------------------------------- */
#catlinks {
    background: var(--wv-paper-2);
    border: 1px solid var(--wv-line);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--wv-navy);
    font-family: var(--wv-sans);
    font-size: 85%;
}

/* ---- infobox card ------------------------------------------------------- */
table.infobox {
    float: right;
    clear: right;
    width: 22em;
    margin: 0 0 1em 1.5em;
    background: #fffefb;
    border: 1px solid var(--wv-line-strong);
    border-spacing: 0;
    font-family: var(--wv-sans);
    font-size: 88%;
    line-height: 1.45;
}
table.infobox .infobox-title {
    background: var(--wv-navy);
    color: var(--wv-gold-bright);
    font-family: var(--wv-serif);
    font-size: 118%;
    font-weight: bold;
    padding: 7px 10px;
    text-align: center;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}
table.infobox .infobox-label {
    background: var(--wv-paper-2);
    color: #2c3345;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-align: left;
    vertical-align: top;
    padding: 5px 9px;
    width: 32%;
    white-space: nowrap;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--wv-line);
}
table.infobox .infobox-data {
    padding: 5px 9px;
    vertical-align: top;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--wv-line);
}
table.infobox .infobox-image {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 8px;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--wv-line);
}
table.infobox .infobox-caption { font-size: 92%; color: #5a6172; padding-top: 3px; }
table.infobox .infobox-section {
    background: #dfe3ee;
    color: var(--wv-navy);
    font-family: var(--wv-serif);
    font-variant: small-caps;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 3px 9px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--wv-line-strong);
}

/* ---- per-series footer navbox (same family as the infobox) -------------- */
table.navbox {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 1.5em;
    background: #fffefb;
    border: 1px solid var(--wv-line-strong);
    border-spacing: 0;
    font-family: var(--wv-sans);
    font-size: 88%;
    line-height: 1.5;
}
table.navbox .navbox-title {
    background: var(--wv-navy);
    font-family: var(--wv-serif);
    font-size: 108%;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    text-align: center;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}
table.navbox .navbox-title a { color: var(--wv-gold-bright); }
table.navbox .navbox-label {
    background: var(--wv-paper-2);
    color: #2c3345;
    text-align: left;
    vertical-align: top;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    width: 6em;
    white-space: nowrap;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--wv-line);
}
table.navbox .navbox-data { padding: 4px 10px; vertical-align: top; border-top: 1px solid var(--wv-line); }

/* ---- notice banners ------------------------------------------------------ */
.willverse-banner {
    background: #fdf6e3;
    border: 1px solid var(--wv-gold);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    margin: 0 0 1em;
    font-family: var(--wv-sans);
    font-size: 92%;
}

/* ---- spoiler strip (baseline inline styles live in the gadget) ---------- */
.willverse-spoiler-controls { font-family: var(--wv-sans); }
.willverse-spoiler-controls select { font-size: 95%; }

/* ---- Main Page ----------------------------------------------------------- */
body.page-Main_Page #firstHeading,
body.page-Main_Page #siteSub { display: none; }
body.page-Main_Page #contentSub { margin: 0; }

.wv-hero {
    background: var(--wv-navy);
    border: 1px solid var(--wv-navy-2);
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--wv-gold);
    color: #dfe3ee;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 26px 18px 20px;
    margin: 0 0 1.2em;
}
.wv-hero-title {
    font-family: var(--wv-serif);
    font-size: 240%;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    font-variant: small-caps;
    color: var(--wv-gold-bright);
    line-height: 1.15;
}
.wv-hero-tag { font-size: 105%; margin-top: 6px; color: #c7cddd; }
.wv-hero-stats { margin-top: 12px; font-family: var(--wv-sans); font-size: 85%; color: #9aa4bd; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
.wv-hero-stats b { color: var(--wv-gold-bright); font-weight: normal; }
.wv-hero a { color: var(--wv-gold-bright); }

.wv-cards { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 0 0 0.5em; }
.wv-card {
    flex: 1 1 160px;
    background: #fffefb;
    border: 1px solid var(--wv-line-strong);
    border-top: 3px solid var(--wv-navy);
    text-align: center;
    padding: 14px 10px 12px;
    font-family: var(--wv-sans);
    transition: transform 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease;
}
.wv-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); border-top-color: var(--wv-gold); }
.wv-card .wv-card-emblem img { width: 44px; height: 44px; }
.wv-card-title { font-family: var(--wv-serif); font-weight: bold; font-size: 108%; margin-top: 6px; }
.wv-card-sub { color: #6b7183; font-size: 84%; }

.wv-cols { display: flex; gap: 22px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.wv-cols > div { flex: 1 1 280px; }

/* ---- per-section sourced-facts ledger (collapsed receipts under the prose) ---- */
.wv-facts {
    background: var(--wv-paper-2);
    border: 1px solid var(--wv-line);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--wv-gold);
    margin: 0.6em 0 1.2em;
    padding: 5px 12px 7px;
}
.wv-facts-head {
    display: inline-block;
    font-family: var(--wv-sans);
    font-size: 80%;
    letter-spacing: 0.07em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #6f7587;
}
.wv-facts-count { color: var(--wv-navy); font-weight: bold; }
.wv-facts .mw-collapsible-toggle { font-family: var(--wv-sans); font-size: 80%; }
ul.wv-fact-list { list-style: none; margin: 6px 0 2px !important; padding: 0; font-size: 93%; }
ul.wv-fact-list > li { padding: 3px 0 3px 16px; border-top: 1px dotted var(--wv-line); position: relative; margin: 0; }
ul.wv-fact-list > li:first-child { border-top: none; }
ul.wv-fact-list > li::before { content: "❧"; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 3px; color: var(--wv-gold); font-size: 88%; }
